Smart casual kantor — tidak perlu blazer, tetap rapi
occasion_rules.color_palette: earthy neutrals, pastel, light blue, beige, olive

color_harmony_rules.name: complementary
color_harmony_rules.description: Warna berlawanan di color wheel — high contrast, eye-catching
color_harmony_rules.use_case: Statement outfit, foto OOTD, acara casual yang mencolok

color_harmony_rules.name: analogous
color_harmony_rules.description: Warna bersebelahan di color wheel — harmonis, menenangkan
color_harmony_rules.use_case: Kantor, acara formal, tampilan profesional yang kalem

color_harmony_rules.name: monochrome
color_harmony_rules.description: Satu warna dalam berbagai gradasi shade dan tint — elegan dan sleek
color_harmony_rules.use_case: Formal dinner, business meeting, tampilan minimalis modern

color_harmony_rules.name: triadic
color_harmony_rules.description: Tiga warna dengan jarak sama di color wheel — playful, vibrant, energik
color_harmony_rules.use_case: Casual weekend, streetwear, festival, tampilan berani
